title: IBBIS Issues New DNA Synthesis Screening Guidelines
summary: The International Biosecurity and Biosafety Initiative for Science has released updated guidelines mandating function-based screening alongside sequence similarity searches.
relevance_to_screening: Directly impacts the compliance requirements for the 'SAFE' vs 'REVIEW' thresholds in BioLens.

title: Novel Evasion Technique Identified in Open Source Models
summary: A new technique utilizing synonymous codon substitution to evade basic BLAST-based screening has been reported in recent open-weight LLMs.
relevance_to_screening: Validates the use of function-aware screening. Ensure Synthscreen adapter confidence scores reflect potential synonymous substitutions.

title: EU AI Act Biosecurity Provisions Enter Enforcement Phase
summary: Biological design tools must now incorporate mandatory safeguards and audit logging under the EU AI Act's high-risk systems classification.
relevance_to_screening: BioLens audit trail features directly support this compliance requirement.

title: OSTP Screening Framework Updated for AI Tools
summary: The Office of Science and Technology Policy updated its synthesis screening framework to include specific evaluations for AI-generated sequences.
relevance_to_screening: Requires BioLens operators to classify AI-generated versus naturally sourced sequence queries when known.

title: Advisory: Spike in Synthetic Pathogen Queries
summary: Providers report a 300% increase in queries for optimized viral vector sequences matching restricted taxonomy lists.
relevance_to_screening: Operators should temporarily elevate the baseline risk tier for novel viral vector sequences.

title: Benchmarking Function-Aware Screening Systems
summary: A new paper benchmarks Synthscreen and similar models against traditional heuristic screening, showing a 40% reduction in false negatives.
relevance_to_screening: Supports the core Track 1 methodology. Reference this when discussing model confidence metrics.
